Product Details
Elastomer Elements

Replaceable elastomer components for couplings and vibration-damping assemblies that balance flexibility and load transmission.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

Elastomer Elements

Used to tune torsional behavior, absorb shock, and maintain practical serviceability in coupling systems.

Elastomer Elements are available in different hardness options to help coupling systems balance torque transmission, vibration damping, and replacement efficiency.

Hardness Options

Different elastomer grades can be selected around damping level and torsional stiffness needs.

Shock Absorption

Helps reduce impact loading and smooth out vibration in transmission systems.

Service Convenience

Replaceable elements support faster maintenance and practical lifecycle management.
